name: Atmos Energy Corporation
description: Atmos Energy Corporation, headquartered in Dallas, Texas, is the country's largest fully regulated, natural-gas-only distributor, serving more than 3 million natural gas distribution customers in over 1,400 communities across eight states. The company also manages proprietary pipeline and storage assets, including one of the largest intrastate natural gas pipeline systems in Texas. Atmos Energy is committed to delivering safe, reliable, efficient, and environmentally friendly natural gas service to its customers.
